items.title: Sinner advances to Italian Open final vs. Ruud
items.summary: Jannik Sinner overcame Mother Nature and Daniil Medvedev on Saturday to advance to Sunday's Italian Open final against Casper Ruud.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Celtic show spirit of champions to rip up Hearts' ...
items.summary: ESPN's Mark Donaldson breaks down all the big talking points as Celtic claimed their 56th top-flight title and denied Hearts their first since 1960.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Preakness Stake 2026 odds, post positions: Iron Honor, Incredibolt, Taj Mahal picks by racing expert
items.summary: Jody Demling, who has called 11 Preakness winners, reveals his picks for 2026 Preakness Stakes horses such as Iron Honor, Taj Mahal and Incredibolt
